message:
fix(share): replace bounded ancestor walk with Path::ancestors iterator

Both detection.rs and hosting.rs had find_ancestor_path implementations
that used a manual loop capped at 10 iterations, silently failing for
deeply nested directory trees. Replace with std::path::Path::ancestors()
which walks to the filesystem root without an arbitrary depth limit.

Add find_ancestor_path_walks_past_ten_levels tests in both modules
confirming discovery at 12 levels of nesting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
